title: TerraFly
description: This mod is the bridge between TerraFirmaCraft and Immersive Aircraft
body:
![Craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e665d21f5cea7662ae67189e37666a23e32207e.png)
This mod is the bridge between TFC and Immersive Aircraft. It adds some crafts to connect TFC survival expierence and beautiful IA planes, airships and helicopters.
